outfit_info.outfit_description: This outfit showcases a sophisticated yet relaxed preppy style, featuring a light blue shirt, a navy cable-knit cardigan, and khaki linen pants. A plaid shirt casually draped over the shoulders adds a touch of effortless charm. Dark brown boat shoes complete this comfortable, refined look.

model_attributes.body: The model has a lean build, presenting a poised and confident demeanor, with a natural, relaxed posture.
model_attributes.pose: The model stands casually, hands in pockets, looking slightly upward and to the side, conveying an unpretentious ease.
model_attributes.background: The background is a clean, minimalist light gray, providing a neutral and uncluttered setting for the outfit.
